Name: Paracetamol
Notes: Paracetamol (acetaminophen) is a widely used analgesic and antipyretic for mild-to-moderate pain and fever, effective within an hour.

Name: Ondem-MD
Notes: Ondem-MD (ondansetron) is an antiemetic medication used to prevent and treat nausea and vomiting, especially after surgery, chemotherapy, or radiation.

Name: Sporlac
Notes: Sporlac is a popular brand of probiotic supplements in India designed to support digestive health and restore gut flora.

Name: Digene Gel
Notes: Digene is used to provide relief from acidity, heartburn, indigestion, gastritis, and abdominal cramps.

Name: A to Z NS Oral Drops
Notes: A to Z NS Oral Drops (and variants like A to Z NS+ or A to Z Drops) are popular multivitamin and multimineral oral drops, often Mango flavored.
